questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the 'res' directory in the Android project directory structure?
Which of the following is an example of a valid layout file in the 'res/layout' directory?
questions.hint: A valid layout file should have a .xml extension

questions.question: What is the purpose of the ' AndroidManifest.xml' file in the Android project?
questions.hint: Declares the application's components and permissions
